_comment: Authored by Claude. Daemon reads this on every loop. Update whenever thesis changes — daemon picks up within one tick. Keep it tight: one primary entry per directional thesis per instrument. Management alerts (trail, partial, exit) are separate.
pruned_removed: audusd_breakdown_sell_zone (redundant with breakdown_trigger — break-and-retest is the cleaner entry)
eurusd_breakout_level (bullish thesis dead in risk-off regime; USD safe-haven bid caps EUR)
oil_crude_95_escalation_2 (same thesis as $90 entry, just further out — $90 is actionable, $95 is signal-only)
oil_crude_deescalation_83 (self-noted REMOTE — requires blockade lifted AND Iran signing, neither in sight)
gold_break_4900 (redundant with buy_zone — one primary long entry per directional thesis)

level_alerts.note: Break of 0.707 = prior pivot gone. Short on retest of 0.707 from below. SL 0.713, TP 0.700. Risk-off + AUD first-to-bleed regime.
DOUBLE TAILWIND: MoF intervention red line 160.00 + risk-off yen safe-haven bid from US-Iran escalation. Short on entry. Thesis STRONGER under blockade regime.
Break 158.50 = risk-off yen flight confirmed. Short on retest from below (no intervention needed — pure flow).
CAD oil-linked — US blockade → oil rip → CAD strong. Short USDCAD on bounce. Caveat: USD safe-haven bid could cap move; if DXY >99 abort.
WTI >$90 = blockade priced harder. US Navy blockade day 4, Hormuz fully closed, ships attacked. Primary entry — wait for pullback to break-retest.
Safe-haven long on pullback into zone. Blockade + closed Hormuz + ship attacks = gold bid. Entry ~4800 with rejection wick, SL 4745, TP 4900/5000. Conv 3-4.
Psych level — exit zone for any gold longs; profit-take / partial. Not an entry.
